question: హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ 1 గా ఉన్న అన్ని రికార్డుల యొక్క హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడి (household ID), హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ నంబర్ (household number), హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ (household split number) మరియు స్టేట్ కోడ్ (state code)లను హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడి క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER, T2.STATE_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, fact_household_core.household_split_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id;
raw_output: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, fact_household_core.household_split_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id;

question: కొత్త గృహ విభజన సంఖ్య (new household split number) సున్నా కంటే ఎక్కువగా ఉన్న గృహాల కోసం, అత్యధిక రికార్డులు కలిగిన మొదటి 10 జిల్లా కోడ్‌లను వాటి జిల్లా కోడ్ ఆధారంగా గ్రూప్ చేసి జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 0 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql: SELECT district_code FROM dim_geography_hierarchy gh JOIN fact_household_core hc ON gh.geography_id = hc.geography_id WHERE hc.new_household_split_number > 0 GROUP BY district_code ORDER BY COUNT(hc.household_id) DESC LIMIT 10;
raw_output: SELECT district_code FROM dim_geography_hierarchy gh JOIN fact_household_core hc ON gh.geography_id = hc.geography_id WHERE hc.new_household_split_number > 0 GROUP BY district_code ORDER BY COUNT(hc.household_id) DESC LIMIT 10;

question: పూర్తయిన స్థితి (completion status) 'Located' గా ఉన్న గృహాలకు సంబంధించిన జియోగ్రఫీ ఐడిలను (geography IDs) జాబితా చేయండి, ప్రత్యేకంగా హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ల (household split numbers) కౌంట్ సున్నా కంటే ఎక్కువగా ఉన్న జియోగ్రఫీ ఐడిలను మాత్రమే చూపండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' GROUP BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) > 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fhc.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core fhc
JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fhc.household_split_number > 0;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fhc.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core fhc
JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fhc.household_split_number > 0;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: False). Gold count: 2452. Pred count: 824.

question: కొత్త గృహ విభజన సంఖ్య (new household split number) 1 మరియు పూర్తి స్థితి (completion status) 'Moved out' గా ఉన్న గృహాలకు సంబంధించి, గృహ ఐడి (household ID), రాష్ట్ర కోడ్ (state code) మరియు జిల్లా కోడ్ (district code) జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T2.STATE_CODE, T2.DISTRICT_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 AND T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Moved out'
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code, dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1 AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out';
raw_output: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code, dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1 AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out';

question: గృహ విభజన సంఖ్య (household split number) 1 లేదా పూర్తి స్థితి (completion status) 'Located' గా ఉన్న గృహాలకు సంబంధించిన విభిన్న భౌగోళిక ఐడిల (geography IDs) జాబితాను రూపొందించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 OR T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located';
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
LEFT JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 OR dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located';
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
LEFT JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 OR dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located';

question: పూర్తి చేసిన స్థితి (completion status) 'Located' గా ఉన్న లేదా గృహ విభజన సంఖ్య (household split number) 1 గా ఉన్న గృహాల యొక్క జియోగ్రఫీ ఐడిలను (geography IDs), వాటి జియోగ్రఫీ ఐడిల ఆధారంగా గ్రూప్ చేసి, ఆరోహణ క్రమంలో (ascending order) జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' OR T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 GROUP BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID ORDER BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' OR fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1
GROUP BY fact_household_core.geography_id
ORDER BY fact_household_core.geography_id ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' OR fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1
GROUP BY fact_household_core.geography_id
ORDER BY fact_household_core.geography_id ASC;

question: కొత్త హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ ఒకటి కంటే ఎక్కువగా ఉన్న గృహాల కోసం, జిల్లా కోడ్‌లు మరియు హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడిల మొత్తం సంఖ్యను జాబితా చేయండి. వీటిని జిల్లా కోడ్ ఆధారంగా సమూహపరిచి (grouped), ఆ సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా అవరోహణ క్రమంలో మొదటి 10 ఫలితాలను చూపండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 1 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(DISTINCT fact_household_core.household_id) AS household_count
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 1
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY household_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(DISTINCT fact_household_core.household_id) AS household_count
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 1
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY household_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 10. Pred count: 10.

question: హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ 1 గా ఉన్న అన్ని రికార్డులకు సంబంధించి హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడి (ID), హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ నంబర్, కొత్త హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ మరియు పూర్తి చేసిన స్థితిని (completion status) హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడి ఆధారంగా క్రమబద్ధీకరించి జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER, T2.COMPLETION_STATUS FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, fact_household_core.new_household_split_number, dim_household_status.completion_status FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id;
raw_output: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, fact_household_core.new_household_split_number, dim_household_status.completion_status FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id;

question: పూర్తిస్థాయి స్థితి (completion status) 'Located' గా ఉన్న గృహాలను మాత్రమే పరిగణనలోకి తీసుకుని, ప్రతి జిల్లాకు సంబంధించిన జిల్లా కోడ్‌లు మరియు హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ల గణనను జాబితా చేయండి మరియు అత్యధిక గణనలు కలిగిన మొదటి 5 జిల్లాలను చూపండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS household_split_count
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id

WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY household_split_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY household_split_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Moved out' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:

question: హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ సున్నా కాని అన్ని గృహాలకు సంబంధించి హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడి (household ID), హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ నంబర్ మరియు స్టేట్ కోడ్‌లను జాబితా చేయండి, ప్రతి సమూహానికి కనీసం ఒక హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్టేటస్ ఐడి రికార్డు ఉండేలా చూసుకోండి మరియు ఫలితాలను హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడి ఆధారంగా ఆరోహణ క్రమంలో అమర్చండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.STATE_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER != 0 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.STATE_CODE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number != 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;
raw_output: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number != 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;

question: పూర్తి చేసిన స్థితి (completion status) 'Located' గా ఉన్న లేదా కొత్త గృహ విభజన సంఖ్య (new household split number) 1 కంటే ఎక్కువగా ఉన్న గృహాలకు సంబంధించి, జియోగ్రఫీ ఐడి (geography ID) ల వారీగా సమూహపరిచిన (grouped) మరియు క్రమబద్ధీకరించిన (ordered) జియోగ్రఫీ ఐడిల జాబితాను చూపండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' OR T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 1 GROUP BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID ORDER BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID
predicted_sql:
SELECT geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' OR fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 1
GROUP BY geography_id
ORDER BY geography_id;
raw_output:
SELECT geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' OR fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 1
GROUP BY geography_id
ORDER BY geography_id;

question: పూర్తి చేసిన స్థితి (completion status) 'Moved out' గా ఉన్న గృహాల కోసం, జిల్లా కోడ్‌లు మరియు కొత్త హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్‌ల గణనను వాటి జిల్లా కోడ్ ఆధారంగా గ్రూప్ చేసి జాబితా చేయండి మరియు అత్యధిక గణనలు కలిగిన మొదటి 5 జిల్లాలను మాత్రమే చూపండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Moved out' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS new_household_split_count
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out' AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 2
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY new_household_split_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS new_household_split_count
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out' AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 2
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY new_household_split_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 5. Pred count: 0.

question: కొత్త హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ సున్నా కాకుండా ఉండి, కనీసం ఒక హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్టేటస్ ఐడి నమోదై ఉన్న అన్ని గృహాలకు సంబంధించి హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడి, హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ నంబర్ మరియు డిస్ట్రిక్ట్ కోడ్‌లను హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడి ఆధారంగా ఆరోహణ క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.DISTRICT_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER != 0 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number <> 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;
raw_output: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number <> 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;

question: 'రాజస్థాన్' రాష్ట్రంలోని గృహాల కోసం భౌగోళిక సోపానక్రమం (geography hierarchy) నుండి PSU కోడ్‌లను జాబితా చేయండి, ఇక్కడ పూర్తి స్థితి (completion status) 'Located' అని ఉండాలి, వాటి PSU కోడ్ ద్వారా సమూహపరచబడి (grouped), వాటి గృహ విభజన సంఖ్యల (household split numbers) మొత్తం ఖచ్చితంగా సున్నా అయి ఉండాలి మరియు ఫలితాలను PSU కోడ్ ఆధారంగా ఆరోహణ క్రమంలో అమర్చండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.PSU_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T1.STATE_CODE = 'Rajasthan' GROUP BY T1.PSU_CODE HAVING SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) = 0 ORDER BY T1.PSU_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan'
  AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
HAVING SUM(fact_household_core.household_split_number) = 0
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan'
  AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
HAVING SUM(fact_household_core.household_split_number) = 0
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;

question: కుటుంబంలోని సభ్యులందరి వయస్సు కనీసం 22 ఏళ్లు ఉండి, మరియు ఆ కుటుంబంలోని సభ్యులెవరికీ వివాహం కాలేదని సూచించే వైవాహిక స్థితి కోడ్ (marital status code) ఉన్న గృహాల ఐడిల (household IDs) జాబితాను రూపొందించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.AGE >= 22 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES AS T3 WHERE T3.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = T2.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID AND T3.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = 'Married') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT household_id
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY household_id
HAVING MIN(age) >= 22 AND MAX(CASE WHEN marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;
raw_output:
SELECT household_id
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY household_id
HAVING MIN(age) >= 22 AND MAX(CASE WHEN marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;

question: పూర్తిస్థాయి స్థితి (completion status) 'Located' గా ఉండి మరియు గృహ విభజన సంఖ్య (household split number) 1 కి సమానంగా ఉన్న గృహాల యొక్క భౌగోళిక ఐడిల (geography IDs) జాబితాను ఇవ్వండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1
predicted_sql:
SELECT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1;
raw_output:
SELECT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1;

question: ప్రతి సభ్యుని వయస్సు కనీసం 46 ఏళ్లు ఉండి, మరియు 'వివాహితులు' (Married) అనే వైవాహిక స్థితి కలిగిన వ్యక్తులు ఎవరూ లేని గృహాల యొక్క ఐడి (ID)లను జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES AS T2 ON T1.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = T2.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID WHERE T1.AGE >= 46 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T2.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT household_id
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY household_id
HAVING MIN(fact_person_core.age) >= 46 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN dim_demographic_codes.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 END) = 0;
raw_output:
SELECT household_id
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY household_id
HAVING MIN(fact_person_core.age) >= 46 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN dim_demographic_codes.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 END) = 0;

question: 22 ఏళ్లు లేదా అంతకంటే ఎక్కువ వయస్సు ఉన్న వ్యక్తుల పర్సన్ కోర్ రికార్డుల నుండి హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడిలను (Household IDs) జాబితా చేయండి, ప్రత్యేకంగా 'Married' (వివాహితులు) అనే మ్యారిటల్ స్టేటస్ కోడ్ ఉన్న కనీసం ఒక్క వ్యక్తి కూడా లేని హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడిలను మాత్రమే ఎంచుకోండి మరియు ఫలితాలను హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడి ఆధారంగా క్రమబద్ధీకరించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE ON FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID = FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE FACT_PERSON_CORE.AGE >= 22 AND FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID NOT IN (SELECT FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE JOIN DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES ON FACT_PERSON_CORE.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID WHERE DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = 'Married') ORDER BY FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID

    SELECT DISTINCT fact_person_core.household_id
    FROM fact_person_core
    JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_ind
    WHERE dim_demographic_codes.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married'
  )
ORDER BY fact_person_core.household_id;

    JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_ind

ORDER BY fact_person_core.household_id;

question: హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ 1 కలిగిన మొదటి 10 రికార్డుల వయస్సు మరియు హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్‌ను, వయస్సు ఆధారంగా గరిష్ట స్థాయి నుండి కనిష్ట స్థాయికి క్రమబద్ధీకరించి జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.AGE, T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T2.AGE DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT fact_person_core.age, fact_household_core.household_split_number
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN fact_household_core ON fact_person_core.household_id = fact_household_core.household_id
WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY fact_person_core.age DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT fact_person_core.age, fact_household_core.household_split_number
FROM fact_person_core

WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY fact_person_core.age DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: పూర్తిస్థాయి స్థితి (completion status) 'Located' గా ఉండి, గృహ విభజన సంఖ్య (household split number) 0 మరియు కొత్త గృహ విభజన సంఖ్య (new household split number) 1 గా ఉన్న గృహాలకు సంబంధించిన ప్రత్యేకమైన PSU కోడ్‌లను ఆరోహణ క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.PSU_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 0 AND T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T1.PSU_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 0
  AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 0
  AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;

question: ప్రతి లింగ కోడ్ (sex code) కోసం, ఆ లింగ కోడ్‌ను పేర్కొంటూ వ్యక్తుల సగటు వయస్సును లెక్కించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SEX_CODE, AVG(T2.AGE) FROM DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = T2.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID GROUP BY T1.SEX_CODE
predicted_sql: SELECT dim_demographic_codes.sex_code, AVG(fact_person_core.age) AS average_age FROM fact_person_core JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id GROUP BY dim_demographic_codes.sex_code;

question: ప్రతి పర్సన్ ఐడి (person ID) మరియు హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ (household split number) కోసం, గరిష్ట వయస్సు (maximum age) మరియు హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్‌ను కనుగొనండి. ఇందులో గరిష్ట వయస్సు 13 కంటే ఎక్కువగా ఉన్న వారిని ఫిల్టర్ చేసి, గరిష్ట వయస్సు ఆధారంగా అవరోహణ క్రమంలో (descending order) మొదటి 10 ఫలితాలను జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT MAX(T2.AGE), T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER, T2.PERSON_ID HAVING MAX(T2.AGE) > 13 ORDER BY MAX(T2.AGE) DESC LIMIT 10;
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_person_core.person_id, fact_household_core.household_split_number, MAX(fact_person_core.age) AS max_age FROM fact_person_core JOIN fact_household_core ON fact_person_core.household_id = fact_household_core.household_id GROUP BY fact_person_core.person_id, fact_household_core.household_split_number HAVING MAX(fact_person_core.age) > 13 ORDER BY max_age DESC LIMIT 10;
raw_output: SELECT fact_person_core.person_id, fact_household_core.household_split_number, MAX(fact_person_core.age) AS max_age FROM fact_person_core JOIN fact_household_core ON fact_person_core.household_id = fact_household_core.household_id GROUP BY fact_person_core.person_id, fact_household_core.household_split_number HAVING MAX(fact_person_core.age) > 13 ORDER BY max_age DESC LIMIT 10;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 10. Pred count: 10.

question: కొత్త హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్ సున్నా కాని గృహాల కోసం, జిల్లా కోడ్‌లు మరియు హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ ఐడిల మొత్తం సంఖ్యను జాబితా చేయండి. వీటిని జిల్లా కోడ్ ఆధారంగా గ్రూప్ చేసి, అత్యధిక సంఖ్య ఉన్న మొదటి 10 ఫలితాలను అవరోహణ క్రమంలో చూపండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER <> 0 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(DISTINCT fact_household_core.household_id) AS total_households
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number != 0
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_households DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:

ORDER BY total_households DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: పూర్తి చేసిన స్థితి 'Moved out' (తరలివెళ్లారు) అని ఉన్న గృహాల కోసం, జిల్లా కోడ్‌లు మరియు హౌస్‌హోల్డ్ స్ప్లిట్ నంబర్‌ల మొత్తం సంఖ్యను వాటి జిల్లా కోడ్ ఆధారంగా సమూహపరిచి (grouped) జాబితా చేయండి మరియు అత్యధిక సంఖ్య కలిగిన మొదటి 5 జిల్లాలను మాత్రమే చూపండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Moved out' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS total_household_split_number
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_household_split_number DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS total_household_split_number

WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_household_split_number DESC
LIMIT 5;
